## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## Steps to Reproduce

<!-- How to reproduce the bug. Include any specific flows (e.g. Sales checkout, Customer Utang entry). -->

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened? Include error logs or error screens if any. -->

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your problem. -->

## Environment / Device Details

<!-- Please provide the details of the environment you ran the app on. -->

- **Device/Simulator**: [e.g., iPhone 15 Simulator, Samsung Galaxy S23]
- **OS Version**: [e.g., iOS 17.2, Android 14]
- **Expo SDK Version**: [e.g., SDK 54]
- **App Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]

## Invariant Checks

<!-- Make sure you have checked the following offline-first invariants if you are investigating the bug: -->

- [ ] Does this bug occur when the device is completely offline (Airplane Mode)?
- [ ] Is there any float-precision/money rounding issue (e.g., outstanding balance off by centavos)?

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., SQL logs, stack trace). -->
